channel.title: Deployment-Workflow on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Deployment-Workflow on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Draft & Deploy on Azure Firewall
item.description:
Azure Firewall Policy adds a Draft & Deploy workflow that separates editing from deployment to reduce deployment time and operational disruption when updating policies.

  • Source: Azure Updates
